title: Crispy Venezuelan Butter Pudding
description: This buttery and crispy dessert is a cozy Venezuelan dish featuring vanilla, kneadable in texture for added enjoyment.

ingredients.name: 4 oz bittersweet chocolate, chopped
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with 1/4 cup cornstarch for a gluten-free option.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Mix almond flour, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a small bowl.
Stir melted butter into the flour mixture until well combined.
Add egg yolks, milk, and vanilla extract. Stir until smooth without lumps.
Pour batter into a 9x9 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until edges are golden brown and top is firm to the touch.
